docket_entries.description: FRAUD, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYDEL, RICK AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, SID LEE, ERIC KYRIAZI, PAUL SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SYDEL, RICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, SID LEE, ERIC KYRIAZI, PAUL RENEWED PRINCIPAL AMOUNT AS TO JUDGMENT DEBTORS SID CAMPBELL AND ERIC LEE IS $29,633.44. RENEWED PRINCIPAL AMOUNT AS TO JUDGMENT DEBTOR PAUL KYRIAZI IS $51,445.11. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
